summary: Frontend testing completed for 3 new features: Why Website page (/waarom-website), Price Calculator page (/calculator), and updated Maintenance service description. All core functionality works correctly.

issues: Language preference not persisted to localStorage - direct URL navigation resets to Dutch. Minor UX issue, not critical.

passed_tests: /waarom-website page loads correctly with hero section showing 'Waarom een website tegenwoordig geen luxe meer is'
/waarom-website page displays all user-provided Dutch content about why websites are not a luxury anymore
/waarom-website page shows 95% statistic, 24/7 availability, €350 starting price
/waarom-website page has back link to homepage, calculator link, and contact CTA
/waarom-website page includes pricing comparison (Traditional €1,500-€5,000+ vs Yrvante €350)
/waarom-website page includes 'Wat krijg je bij Yrvante?' section with 3 benefit cards
/calculator page loads correctly with title 'Wat kost een website?'
/calculator page: Basic website type selection (€350) works
/calculator page: Advanced website type selection (€450) works - total updates dynamically
/calculator page: Extra pages counter (+/-) works correctly (€25 per page)
/calculator page: All add-on checkboxes work (SEO €75, Contact form €35, Analytics €45, etc.)
/calculator page: Monthly maintenance toggle shows €15/mnd when enabled
/calculator page: Total price updates dynamically with all selections
/calculator page: Summary panel displays all selected items with correct pricing
Homepage Services section shows updated 'Maandelijks Onderhoud' with 'optioneel' text
Homepage Services section displays full description: 'Dit abonnement is optioneel — zonder dit plan ben je na oplevering zelf verantwoordelijk voor het onderhoud van je website.'
'Bereken je prijs' button below services section links correctly to /calculator
'Waarom een website?' button below services section links correctly to /waarom-website
Navigation between pages works (back links, homepage links, CTA links)
Both pages have proper footer with Yrvante branding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features were implemented and tested: 1) WhyWebsitePage at /waarom-website with comprehensive Dutch content about website importance, 2) CalculatorPage at /calculator with dynamic pricing calculator supporting website types (basic €350, advanced €450) and multiple add-ons, 3) Updated Maandelijks Onderhoud service description on homepage with 'optioneel' clarification. All features work correctly. Minor note: language preference is not persisted to localStorage, so direct URL navigation always shows Dutch. This is expected React state behavior.
